archetype: 3 (Pastel & Soft) / Organic & Earthy Hybrid - Editorial Scrapbook

rules: Never use Inter or generic sans for headings.
Mix Gloock (italic) with Cormorant Garamond for editorial flair.
Use Caveat for overlapping annotations and 'handwritten' corrections.
Body text should be ink (#2A2626), not pure black.

patterns.overlap: Use negative margins (-mt-12) or absolute positioning to layer polaroids over text.

PolaroidCard.structure: div with bg-white, p-3 pb-12, shadow-xl shadow-ink/5, border border-black/5
PolaroidCard.usage: For portrait images and project thumbnails. Must always have a slight rotation.
PolaroidCard.interaction: hover:rotate-0 hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 hover:z-10

StickyNote.structure: div with bg-sticky_note, p-6 shadow-md, font-handwriting text-ink
StickyNote.usage: For fun facts, quick notes, callouts. Pin to corners of other sections.
StickyNote.decoration: Add a TapeStrip component at the top center.

TapeStrip.structure: absolute div w-16 h-6 bg-white/40 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/20 shadow-sm
TapeStrip.usage: Place on edges of polaroids or sticky notes to simulate masking tape. Rotate slightly.

MagazinePullQuote.structure: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-display italic text-red_wine border-l-4 border-red_wine pl-6 my-12

HandwrittenAnnotation.structure: absolute text-red_wine font-handwriting text-xl z-20 pointer-events-none

motion.scrolling: Lenis smooth scrolling is MANDATORY for momentum.
motion.reveals: Framer Motion: initial={opacity: 0, y: 40}, whileInView={opacity: 1, y: 0}, viewport={once: true, margin: '-100px'}
motion.parallax: Apply useScroll and useTransform to images to make them move at different speeds.
motion.cursor: Custom soft follower cursor (mix-blend-difference or a warm dot) - hide default cursor.

section_blueprints.Hero: Editorial cover spread. Massive serif typography 'Frenny Sheth'. Layered polaroids of South Asian woman placeholder. Torn paper edge at the bottom transitioning to About.
section_blueprints.About: Magazine article layout. 2-column text with pull quotes. A sticky note overlapping the text. Handwritten arrows pointing to key transition from 'Computer Engineering -> UX'.
section_blueprints.Education: Scrapbook timeline. A drawn line connecting polaroids and sticky notes representing GTU and Lemon Logic.
section_blueprints.Featured_Projects: 4 Case Studies. Not a standard grid! A staggered masonry layout where each project card looks like a physical folder or magazine page. Magnetic hover 'View Case Study' button.
section_blueprints.Hobbies: Collage moodboard. Messy arrangement of photography, books, and coffee placeholders. Overlapping without strict grid.
section_blueprints.Skills: Chaotic editorial collage of tags. Looks like cut-out words from a magazine pasted onto the background.
section_blueprints.Design_Process: Illustrated journey. Discover -> Define -> Ideate -> Prototype -> Test -> Iterate. Use arrows, doodles, and scribbles.
section_blueprints.Fun_Facts: A corkboard or wall of sticky notes. Each note has a different rotation and handwriting.
section_blueprints.Contact: Looks like a physical letter on lined paper. Inputs are transparent, resting on the lines. A 'Send' button that looks like a wax seal or a stamp.

portraits.description: Warm editorial portrait of a young Indian woman.

accessibility.contrast: Red Wine (#9E182B) and Ink (#2A2626) must be used for text on Oat Milk (#F2E0D2) and Paper (#FAF7F2) backgrounds to ensure WCAG AA compliance.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='contact-submit').
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for all Framer Motion and Lenis animations.

instructions_to_main_agent: Setup Google Fonts in index.html: Cormorant Garamond, Manrope, Gloock, Caveat.
Tailwind configuration must extend colors with the provided hex codes (rose_quartz, blush_pink, red_wine, oat_milk, ink, paper).
Do NOT use standard Shadcn Card components for the layout. Build custom overlapping raw HTML/Tailwind divs for Polaroids and Sticky notes.
Implement routing for 4 Case Studies using React Router.
The Contact form must look like lined paper. Use standard inputs but style them with border-b only, no backgrounds, to match the lines.
Data test IDs are mandatory for QA.
